title: tecoma radicans
intro: Tecoma radicans, also known as the Trumpet Vine or Trumpet Creeper, is a perennial climbing vine native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tecoma radicans include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, among others. Tecoma radicans is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
